summary: Readiness Summary Dashboard Card testing complete. All 20 backend tests pass, UI testing shows ReadinessSummaryCard and RoutingSummaryCard render correctly with all data.
seed_data_creation: Used existing 79 documents with readiness data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Readiness Summary Dashboard Card feature is fully functional. Key verified features: (1) GET /api/dashboard/workflow-intelligence includes readiness_summary with by_status, by_action, confidence_by_status, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons, no_readiness_data. (2) GET /api/readiness/metrics returns total_documents, by_status, by_action, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons, confidence_by_status. (3) ReadinessSummaryCard with data-testid='readiness-summary-card' renders showing: status counts (blocked/needs_review/ready_auto_link/ambiguous/ready_auto_draft), confidence percentages, progress bar, Top Blockers section (vendor_unresolved, missing_required_fields, duplicate_risk), Top Warnings section (policy_hold, po_missing, no_line_items, low_line_item_confidence). (4) RoutingSummaryCard with data-testid='routing-summary-card' still renders correctly with Auto Process/Needs Review/Blocked counts. (5) Top-level dashboard metric cards still work (Total Documents, Validation Rate, Vendor Match Rate, Exceptions).

elements_verified: Status counts (blocked: 44, needs_review: 29, ready_auto_link: 4, ambiguous: 2, ready_auto_draft: 0)

coverage: TestWorkflowIntelligenceReadinessSummary (9 tests): endpoint 200, readiness_summary present, by_status, by_action, confidence_by_status, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons, blocking reason structure, warning reason structure
TestReadinessMetricsEndpoint (7 tests): endpoint 200, total_documents, by_status, by_action, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons, confidence_by_status
TestRoutingSummaryPresence (2 tests): routing_summary present, counts structure
